src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.title: Migrate `nx` imports to `@nx/devkit`
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.description: The `nx` package is the CLI, not a public import surface. Move plugin and script imports to `@nx/devkit` so they keep working in future major versions.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Cache Misses
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to diagnose and fix issues when Nx tasks are not being replayed from cache as expected, using project configuration checks and Nx Cloud tools.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.title: Understanding "CI Execution Failed"
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.description: Common causes and solutions for CI execution failures in Nx Cloud

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.title: Troubleshoot Nx Console Issues
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.description: Learn how to resolve common issues with Nx Console, including Node.js version conflicts with nvm and WSL configuration in JetBrains IDEs.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.title: Unknown Local Cache Error
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.description: Learn how to troubleshoot and resolve Nx cache errors related to machine ID changes, network drives, and understand how Nx ensures cache security.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Convert to Inferred Migration
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common issues when migrating from executor-based tasks to inferred tasks in Nx, with specific solutions for Next.js, Remix, and other frameworks.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.title: Disable Graph Links Created from Analyzing Source Files
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.description: Learn how to configure Nx to only use dependencies defined in package.json instead of detecting dependencies from source code analysis.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Include All package.json Files as Projects
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx to include all package.json files as projects in your workspace graph, not just those referenced in workspaces configuration.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.title: Using Yarn Plug'n'Play with Nx
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.description: Learn how to configure and use Yarn Plug'n'Play (PnP) in your Nx workspace to improve installation speed, reduce disk usage, and enforce dependency constraints.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Nx Installations
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common Nx installation issues, including native module problems, platform compatibility, and Node.js architecture mismatches.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.title: Identify Dependencies Between Folders
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.description: Learn how to analyze and visualize dependencies between folders in your Nx workspace to help identify which code should be extracted into separate libraries.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Including Assets in Your Build
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx executors to include and copy assets into your output bundle using regex patterns or object format for precise control.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.title: Configuring Browser Support
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.description: Learn how to configure browser compatibility for your Nx applications using browserslist, optimize bundle size with modern browser targets, and debug your browser support configuration.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.title: Profiling Performance
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.description: Learn how to profile and optimize Nx task execution performance using Chrome DevTools and environment variables to identify bottlenecks and improve build times.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.title: Fix Nx Commands Failing in Claude Code Sandbox
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.description: Nx commands fail inside Claude Code sandbox because Unix sockets are blocked. Set allowAllUnixSockets to fix daemon, plugin isolation, and forked process errors.
